description.p: **This is a community package of WebStorm and not officially supported by JetBrains s.r.o.**

Integrated development environment for JavaScript, TypeScript, and related technologies, is one of the most popular software development tools from JetBrains. It lets you get straight to coding and makes it easy to tackle the most challenging tasks, like Git merge conflict resolution or renaming a symbol across multiple files.
Here are some key features you get with WebStorm:

ul.li: Out-of-the-box support for JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Vue, Angular, Node.js, HTML, style sheets, and others.
Smart editor with code completion, on-the-fly error detection, safe code refactorings.
Navigation and search across the entire codebase helps you save time moving around as your projects grow in size and complexity.
Integrated developer tools that allow you to debug and test your client-side and Node.js apps as well as to work with version control, linters, build tools, terminal, and HTTP client.

AI Assistant provides context-aware support and AI-powered features to help you streamline time-consuming tasks. It can generate documentation and tests, explain parts of the code, and generate commit messages.
Collaborative and remote development, including a service for real time collaborative development and pair programming.
Customize your workspace the way you like with different themes, customizable shortcuts, and plugins.
Junie, Claude Agent, and Codex available directly in the AI chat
ACP Registry for discovering and installing agents
Next edit suggestions
Service-powered TypeScript engine enabled by default
Alignment with TypeScript 6
String-literal import/export support
Highlighting for new React directives
Angular 21 template syntax
Vue TypeScript integration updates
Astro language server configuration
Svelte generics support
Support for modern CSS color spaces

description.p: This release also includes numerous fixes and quality-of-life improvements to the support for TypeScript, React, Angular, Vue, Astro, Prettier, and more.

ul.li: Astro: Use component prop completion from Language Server
Advanced option to disable interactive environment variables in IJent
Allow customers to bundle their own plugins in IDE distributions
Make Shift+Enter insert a new line in ClaudeCode
Detection of the “use no memo” and “use memo” directives
Bump @vue/typescript-plugin 3.1.8
When using an HTTP proxy, the IDE should prompt to re-enter authentication credentials if the proxy server returns a 407 status code
Implement support for synchronized output mode
Terragrunt Syntax Support in Terraform Plugin
Stabilize progress bar position between single and multiple progresses
Implement new progresses design
Astro: support quick doc for framework-specific parts
Provide a color preview for CSS color-mix()
Indicate when Tailwind LS fails on initialization
LSP: support call hierarchy requests
LSP: support type hierarchy requests
LSP: support Extend Selection / Shrink Selection (textDocument/selectionRange request)
DevKit: check that content module used as a dependency is visible
